goal: Set up cashflow data and run a clean projection successfully

persona.name: Organized Planner
persona.description: You want to set up your cashflow profile carefully and then ask for projections and a simple what-if.
guardrails: Provide complete financial details when asked
Ask one follow-up scenario after baseline projection

steps.instruction: Say you want to set up cashflow tracking with user id "cashflow-user".
Provide recurring income: salary 120000 monthly starting 2026-03-05.
Provide recurring expenses: rent 45000 monthly from 2026-03-01 and internet 5000 monthly from 2026-03-10.
Provide one-time future expense: vacation 30000 on 2026-04-20.
Request projection from 2026-03-01 to 2026-05-31 with safety buffer 20000.
Ask what-if: add an emergency expense of 50000 on 2026-04-15 and compare impact.
